name: Complex Exponent Warp
description: Applies a complex domain distortion z -> z^p where p is controlled by mouse position. Creates spirals, fractals, and inversions.

params.name: Scale
params.description: Zoom scale into the complex plane

params.name: Exponent Spread
params.description: Spread of the complex exponent from mouse position

params.name: UV Warp Scale
params.description: Scale of the UV warp output
